channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/4/30)
channel.description: 今天的内容非常聚焦，几乎都围绕着 **AI 编程、LLM 应用和 Agent 开发** 这几个你关心的方向。从 GitHub 上的热门项目到社区里的深度讨论，信息量很大，我们帮你挑出了最精华的部分。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 今天的内容非常聚焦，几乎都围绕着 **AI 编程、LLM 应用和 Agent 开发** 这几个你关心的方向。从 GitHub 上的热门项目到社区里的深度讨论，信息量很大，我们帮你挑出了最精华的部分。

item.title: nexu-io/open-design
item.description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source alternative to Anthropic's Claude Design. ⚡ 19 Skills · ✨ 71 brand-grade Design Systems · 🖼️ sandboxed preview · 📦 HTML/PDF/PPTX export. 🤖 Runs on Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini CLI / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi CLI. | 近期热门 | 总 4742 stars
item.author: nexu-io

item.title: nexu-io/open-design
item.description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source alternative to Anthropic's Claude Design. ⚡ 19 Skills · ✨ 71 brand-grade Design Systems · 🖼️ sandboxed preview · 📦 HTML/PDF/PPTX export. 🤖 Runs on Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini CLI / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi CLI. | 近期热门 | 总 4742 stars
item.author: nexu-io

item.title: epoko77-ai/im-not-ai
item.description: AI가 쓴 글이 아닌 것처럼 윤문해주는 스킬 | 近期热门 | 总 650 stars
item.author: epoko77-ai

item.title: alash3al/stash
item.description: Stash — persistent memory layer for AI agents. Episodes, facts, and working context stored in Postgres. MCP server included. Self-hosted, single binary, no cloud required. | 近期热门 | 总 562 stars
item.author: alash3al

item.title: GENEXIS-AI/chromex
item.description: A Codex-powered Chrome side-panel assistant for page context, tabs, voice, and image workflows. | 近期热门 | 总 457 stars
item.author: GENEXIS-AI

item.title: NyxTides/ppt-image-first
item.description: PPT image-first skill for Codex/Claude Code/Opencode CLI | 近期热门 | 总 442 stars
item.author: NyxTides

item.title: Kianmhz/GooseRelayVPN
item.description: Socks5 VPN that tunnels raw TCP through Google Apps Script to your VPS exit server (AES‑256‑GCM, domain‑fronted). | 近期热门 | 总 388 stars
item.author: Kianmhz

item.title: sandeco/reversa
item.description: Transform legacy systems into executable specifications for AI coding agents | 近期热门 | 总 165 stars
item.author: sandeco

item.title: aeroxy/ast-outline
item.description: Fast, AST-based structural outline for source files. Built for LLM coding agents and humans. | 近期热门 | 总 94 stars
item.author: aeroxy
